evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Ensure data integrity and accuracy across all reporting layers, including master data management, and validate newly developed datasets and reporting structures.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: The JD centers on data integrity, validation, and master data management with no velocity/speed language, so it is classified rigour.
evidence.domain_risk: Support the Business Intelligence and Controlling teams in budgeting and forecasting activities, contributing analytical input and data validation.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Errors would affect internal financial planning and operational decisions but there is no explicit regulatory, audit, or public-facing consequence, so it is moderate.
evidence.collaboration_width: IT department; Business Intelligence and Controlling teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: Manage and maintain data flows across internal systems (e.g., SAP BW, SAP SAC), ensuring efficient and reliable data processing.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools (SAP BW, SAP SAC) appear in responsibilities alongside established reporting layers, indicating a functioning mid-maturity data operation rather than a greenfield build.
evidence.jd_authorship: Develop and maintain recurring and ad hoc reports for internal and external stakeholders, including Sales reporting, Customer & Emission reporting as well as Operational Performance analysis.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The responsibilities name specific report types and systems, giving a concrete picture of the day-to-day work, which places it as hiring_manager authored.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Support the Business Intelligence and Controlling teams in budgeting and forecasting activities, contributing analytical input and data validation.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience is Controlling/Finance via budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling, placing this in the finance orientation.
evidence.autonomy_level: Support the Business Intelligence and Controlling teams in budgeting and forecasting activities
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The verb 'support' plus 'work independently on daily tasks' frames the role as delivering scoped work rather than setting direction, so it is execution.
evidence.ai_role_explanation: No mention of AI tools expected of the candidate or AI systems consuming the candidate's output.
evidence.testing_framing: Ensure data integrity and accuracy across all reporting layers, including master data management, and validate newly developed datasets and reporting structures.
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data validation and integrity are framed as an owned responsibility with an action verb ('ensure', 'validate'), not just a listed tool, so it is responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Ensure data integrity and accuracy across all reporting layers
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Reliability of data is emphasized but there is no compliance, regulatory, or stakeholder-trust risk register, so it is moderate.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Manage and maintain data flows across internal systems (e.g., SAP BW, SAP SAC), ensuring efficient and reliable data processing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The dominant verbs are 'maintain' and 'ensure' over existing systems rather than building new infrastructure, indicating fix_scale.
evidence.language_gate: Fluency in written and spoken English is mandatory; additional languages such as German or French are considered an advantage.
evidence.loss_aversion: Ensure data integrity and accuracy across all reporting layers, including master data management, and validate newly developed datasets and reporting structures. — reliability is emphasized but without compliance or regulatory framing.
